caveats: Highest dynamic range in Pho regulon; clean single-input
Earliest PhoB-activated promoter; highest affinity Pho box
Activated by low OmpR-P; repressed at high osmolarity
Reciprocal with PompF; pair for ratiometric sensing
Less Fnr-dependent than PnarG; best NarL promoter for aerobic circuits
Highest dynamic range but requires Fnr+IHF; aerobic circuits will see no activation
Requires sigma54 (rpoN present in BL21); UAS at -108 to -143; sharp switch
Heterologous; Daeffler & Tabor 2017; ported to E. coli BL21; fetch uses otr (SO_4144) as TtrR target gene; exact characterized sequence in paper SI
Heterologous; Daeffler & Tabor 2017; exact sequence must be retrieved from paper SI (Addgene); gene not annotated in genome
HARD EXCLUDE: CheY has no DNA-binding domain; acts on flagellar motor switch FliM; cannot drive promoter
